kospi.summary: Declined amid global anxieties over surging oil prices (US crude >$101, Brent >$115) and geopolitical tensions (US-Iran war).

tech.amzn: Positive sentiment around AWS and AI, though with capex concerns.
tech.intc: Mixed signals: institutional selling, but optimism around Core Ultra Series 3 and 18A process.

artMarket.summary: Undergoing 'qualitative transformation'. Sentiment is cautious with polarization in auction markets, shifting focus toward mid-to-lower priced segments.
highlights: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026: Notable sales for Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin.
Auction trends: Sell-through rates >70% with reordering of market standards.
